king: noun. A male monarch; a man who heads a monarchy; in an absolute monarchy, the supreme ruler of his nation.

kir: noun. A cocktail made with a measure of crème de cassis topped up with white wine.
rid: verb. Followed by of: to free (oneself or someone, or a place) from an annoyance or hindrance.
riding: verb. present participle and gerund of ride

ring: noun. A solid object in the shape of a circle.
rink: noun. A man, especially a warrior or hero.
